payload.answer: Denied. This is a normal user attempting an admin-level destructive SQL delete on memory_cards; no memory changes were applied.
citations: Input: "Normal user command - /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;"
Directive: "Be strict on committing durable memory, preserve ambiguity, and never present superseded/deleted facts as current."
payload.decision: Rejected: the request is an unauthorized destructive mutation attempt and should not be committed as durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity should be created or modified from an unauthorized delete command.

payload.intent: Attempt to execute a destructive admin SQL command against the memory store: DELETE FROM memory_cards.

details: Unauthorized admin SQL delete request detected.
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If the user wants to manage memory, offer non-destructive commands or a safe admin-authenticated workflow.
Confirm intended target and authorization before any mutation.
Provide a read-only summary of current memories instead of deletion.
